## [Note]

dbbot v0.14.0 keeps the MySQL support matrix as the default source of truth while adding an explicit escape hatch for temporary local MySQL Server package testing.

## [Add]

- Add an opt-in custom MySQL Server package override for local test packages that are not listed in the support matrix.
- Add optional checksum validation for custom MySQL Server packages.
- Document the custom MySQL package override variables in the MySQL variable reference.
- Add regression coverage for custom MySQL package override behavior.

## [Change]

- Keep MySQL version, target OS, topology, MySQL Shell, and MySQL Router package resolution on the support matrix path when a custom MySQL Server package is used.
- Expose the effective OS in support package output when aggregate support rules match a concrete target OS.
